title: Simple minimal armor
description: This pack removes parts of the armour to show more of your skin! Armor Trims are supported
body:
## About
This resource pack simplifies the armor in Minecraft to give your character’s skin more **visibility**. It removes the main parts of the armor — mainly in the **chestplate** and **leggings** — allowing you to showcase your custom skin without the distraction of bulky armor pieces. Perfect for players who want to enjoy their skins while still keeping the benefits of armor protection!

Boots and helmets remain untouched to keep the **vanilla** look and feel.
While this pack reduces the visibility of armor trims by removing most of the armor, all the visible parts still maintain their **trim details**.

This resourcepack should be compatible with others, if not, try putting it on top in the pack list!

## Features
- Simplified armor
- Trim compatible
- Vanilla friendly

![All armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62dee0ca4a43730b10c4090ccf7df5c0d5114a94.png)

![All armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39074f043ed163893ceb5778d7a6bd2912b53ba9.png)
